data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for walk-up QR booking, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of this feature. The absence of evidence regarding the ability to scan for availability and book on the spot indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of walk-up QR booking functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint for walk-up QR booking validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that scanning a QR code allows users to see availability and book instantly.
